mapper.select: SELECT id, access_token, DATE_FORMAT(expires_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS expires_at, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt, DATE_FORMAT(mod_dt, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS mod_dt FROM tb_instagram_token ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_instagram_token ( access_token, expires_at, reg_dt, mod_dt ) VALUES ( #{accessToken}, DATE_ADD(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), INTERVAL #{expiresInSeconds} SECOND), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_instagram_token SET access_token = #{accessToken}, expires_at = DATE_ADD(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), INTERVAL #{expiresInSeconds} SECOND), mod_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) WHERE id = #{id}
